title: Error "BATproject: does not match always" with subselect/groupby/having
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test (zs Int32, zd Int32, ns Int64, bs Int64, name String);
INSERT INTO test (zs, zd, ns, bs, name) VALUES (1, 2, 10000000000, NULL, 'test1');
INSERT INTO test (zs, zd, ns, bs, name) VALUES (3, 4, 20000000000, 500, 'test2');
SELECT COUNT() FROM (SELECT name, SUM(ns) AS total_ns FROM test GROUP BY name HAVING total_ns > 15000000000);
SELECT zs, zd FROM test WHERE bs IS NULL OR bs < 100;
key_bug_features: Error with subselect and group by having clause
